# The Thyolo House

> Boutique hotel and restaurant on a historic tea estate in Thyolo, Malawi.

The Thyolo House is a charming boutique guesthouse and restaurant located on the Conforzi Tea Estate in Thyolo, Malawi. Originally built as a farmhouse in the early 20th century, this heritage property offers 5 uniquely appointed rooms — 3 suites in the main colonial house and cottages by the swimming pool.

## Accommodation
- 5 boutique rooms on a historic tea estate
- En-suite bathrooms in all rooms
- Self-catering, half-board, and full-board options
- Swimming pool and garden access

## Restaurant
- Italian fusion cuisine with Thai, Indian, and continental influences
- Garden-to-table philosophy using chemical-free ingredients
- Premium teas and coffees from neighboring estates
- Open daily for lunch and dinner

## Experiences
- Art studio and workshops with resident artist Flavia Conforzi
- Tea plantation walks through Conforzi Estate
- Indigenous forest trails
- Swimming pool
- Bird watching

## Location
- Thyolo, Southern Malawi
- 20 minutes from Limbe
- Surrounded by tea gardens and indigenous forest
